contact.headline: Let's talk about your software
contact.description: Book a free 15-minute consultancy call or request a demo of our solutions.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.

home.title: Loggix - Custom Software & FileMaker Development
home.description: Loggix builds custom software with FileMaker, web applications and API integrations for businesses.

hero.headline: We create solutions
hero.description: Welcome to Loggix. We believe every company deserves affordable custom software, tailored to their needs and processes. We build and connect your solution fast and affordable using AI, API's and Webapps.

database.title: Database Solutions
database.subtitle: I.e. FileMaker, Supabase and Elastic
database.description:
Together with you, we build robust database solutions that scale with your business. From simple data management to complex enterprise systems, our custom databases integrate seamlessly with your existing workflows.

You can come to us for the smallest (hourly basis) to the largest (Saas) solutions.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.subtitle: RAG solutions, Lead generation and Voice agents
ai.description: Leverage artificial intelligence to automate processes, generate insights, and create intelligent interactions. Our AI solutions are practical, scalable, and designed for real business impact.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Ready-to-use software solutions
products.description: Our product portfolio includes ready-to-deploy solutions that can be customized to your specific needs. Get started quickly with proven software that has been refined through years of development.

blog.title: Blog & Insights
blog.subtitle: Knowledge sharing and industry trends
blog.description: Stay informed with our latest articles on software development, FileMaker tips, AI innovations, and business automation. We share our expertise to help you make better technology decisions.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Expert developers and consultants
team.description: Our team consists of experienced developers, consultants and project managers spread across the Netherlands, India, Vietnam and New Zealand. Together we bring over 30 years of software development expertise.

filemaker.title: FileMaker Development - Loggix
filemaker.description: Professional FileMaker development: custom databases, integrations and web apps. Claris Partner with 30+ years experience.
filemaker.headline: FileMaker Development
filemaker.intro: For over 30 years we build perfectly fitting custom solutions with the FileMaker platform. From simple databases to complete ERP systems that grow with your business.
filemaker.examplesSubtitle: Discover how we use FileMaker for various businesses and industries.

workplaceOs.subtitle: ERP System
workplaceOs.title: WorkplaceOS Framework
workplaceOs.description: Our modular ERP framework built on FileMaker. Fully customizable with ready-to-use modules for CRM, quotes, invoicing, HR and more.
features: Modular architecture - use only what you need
Integration with external systems via APIs

mediaWorkflow.subtitle: Client Project
mediaWorkflow.title: Media Company Workflow
mediaWorkflow.description: Complete workflow solution for a media company: from project planning to invoicing, including resource management and reporting.

webPortal.subtitle: Integration
webPortal.title: FileMaker + Web Portal
webPortal.description: FileMaker database connected to a customer portal. Customers can place orders online, view status and download invoices.

filemaker.ctaTitle: Ready to start your FileMaker project?
filemaker.ctaDescription: Contact us for a no-obligation conversation about your needs and possibilities.

ai.title: AI Integrations - Loggix
ai.description: Integrate AI into your business processes: ChatGPT, Claude, automatic analyses and smart workflows.
ai.headline: AI Integrations for your Business
ai.intro: We integrate the latest AI technology into your existing systems. Automate documents, gain predictive insights and transform your customer service with smart chatbots.
ai.applicationsSubtitle: Concrete examples of how AI can transform your business.

customerBot.subtitle: AI Assistant
customerBot.title: Smart Customer Service Bot
customerBot.description: AI-powered chatbot that helps customers with FAQs, order tracking and appointment scheduling. Integrated with your FileMaker CRM.
features: Natural language processing in multiple languages

invoiceProcessing.subtitle: Document AI
invoiceProcessing.title: Automatic Invoice Processing
invoiceProcessing.description: AI that reads incoming invoices, categorizes them and automatically processes them in your accounting. From PDF to structured data in seconds.

predictiveAnalysis.subtitle: Predictive Analytics
predictiveAnalysis.title: Predictive Analysis
predictiveAnalysis.description: AI models that recognize patterns in your data: predict sales, identify risks and optimize inventory automatically.

ai.ctaTitle: Ready for AI in your organization?
ai.ctaDescription: Let's discover together which AI possibilities best fit your business.

products.title: Products - Loggix
products.description: Our software products: WorkplaceOS ERP framework, API connectors and ready-to-use modules.
products.headline: Software Products
products.intro: Besides custom development, we create our own software products. Modular ERP systems, API connectors and web templates that immediately add value to your business.

workplaceOs.subtitle: ERP Framework
workplaceOs.title: WorkplaceOS
workplaceOs.description: Our complete ERP framework built on FileMaker. A modular system that grows with your business. Start small and expand when needed.
features: Web portal and mobile app ready

apiSuite.subtitle: Integration Platform
apiSuite.title: API Connector Suite
apiSuite.description: Over 40 ready-made API connectors to connect your FileMaker to popular services: Exact, Mollie, SendGrid, Mailchimp and more.

fmTemplates.subtitle: Web Toolset
fmTemplates.title: FMBetterForms Templates
fmTemplates.description: Ready-to-use web templates for FMBetterForms. From customer portals to internal dashboards - don't start from scratch.

invoiceSimple.subtitle: Standalone Product
invoiceSimple.title: InvoiceSimple
invoiceSimple.description: Simple invoicing software for freelancers and small businesses. No hassle, just create and send invoices.

products.pricingDescription: Our products are available as license, SaaS or as part of a custom project. We're happy to help find the best solution for your situation.

products.ctaDescription: Request a demo or contact us for more information.
